name: solidity_threat_modeling
description: Analyzes smart contract functions, privilege levels, modifier bounds, and dependencies to model access control boundaries and potential logical exploit vectors.

source_code.description: The Solidity contract code to analyze.

roles.description: Identified user/system roles in the contract (e.g., Owner, Admin, User).

privileged_functions.description: List of functions restricted by modifiers/require conditions.

threats.description: Exploit risk threats modeled from the contract structure.
